en.extract:
The Indochinese yuhina or chestnut-collared yuhina (Staphida torqueola) is a bird in the family Zosteropidae. The species was first described by Robert Swinhoe in 1870.


References

BirdLife International (2024).  Staphida torqueola. Downloaded on 4 March 2025.

The '''Indochinese yuhina''' or '''chestnut-collared yuhina''' ('''''Staphida torqueola''''') is a [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. The species was [[Species description|first described]] by [[Robert Swinhoe]] in 1870.

==References==
{{Reflist}}
*BirdLife International (2024).  [https://datazone.birdlife.org/species/factsheet/indochinese-yuhina-staphida-torqueola ''Staphida torqueola'']. Downloaded on 4 March 2025.
